SignFlow
Real-time sign ↔ speech interpreter
FeaturesHow it worksTry the demo
Live in your browser

Sign language, translated in real time.

SignFlow turns speech into signs and signs into speech — instantly, on-device. A 3D avatar signs what you say, and your camera never leaves the browser.

Launch the studioSee how it works
  • No install
  • No account
  • Fully private
LiveEnglish → ASL
Now signing
HELLO
2/3

Built for both sides of the conversation.

Two-way translation that keeps everything on your device — the same engine that powers the live studio.

On-device hand tracking

MediaPipe reads your signs frame by frame. Your camera stream never leaves the browser — nothing is uploaded.

Speech in, signs out

Speak or type English and a 3D avatar signs it back in real time, fingerspelling anything outside its vocabulary.

Signs in, speech out

Translated lines land in your transcript with one-tap audio playback, so hearing users follow along instantly.

Three steps to your first translation.

01

Start a session

Open the studio and wake the 3D signer — no install, no account.

02

Type or speak

Enter English text or talk. SignFlow maps each word to a lexical sign or fingerspells it.

03

Watch it sign

The avatar signs live while your transcript builds line by line beside the stage.

0ms
upload latency — runs in-browser
100%
on-device, private by default
2-way
sign ↔ speech translation

Known words use lexical signs; anything else is fingerspelled letter by letter.

Start translating in seconds.

No downloads. No sign-up. Open the studio and the 3D signer is ready to go.

Launch the studio
SignFlow

Runs entirely in your browser · Real-time sign ↔ speech interpreter
